channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: AI codebases: lock it down with strict mode
item.description: Cut production bugs 60% by enforcing strict linting on AI code — ESLint 9.8.0 and ruff 0.5.0 rules that actually work in 2026.

item.title: 5 feature flag tools that became A/B platforms
item.description: Cut API response time 65% with a self-hosted feature flag system — latency, cost, and offline sync numbers for Flagsmith, LaunchDarkly, and PostHog in 2026.

item.title: Alerts 2026: AI turns false alarms to silence
item.description: Cut on-call wake-ups 70% with AI alert triage — Prometheus 2.47, Node 20, and a 128-line service that silences staging noise in 2026

item.title: Survive network chaos: 9 eventuality patterns
item.description: Cut 4.2 % order failures with 9 eventual-consistency patterns — which one saved $28k Black-Friday weekend? Real code, real AWS bills, real mistakes.

item.title: Postgres 17 replaced Redis, Kafka, and Prometheus
item.description: Postgres 17 beats Redis, Kafka, and Prometheus in cost and simplicity — cache, metrics, and events consolidated with 30% lower bills and 60% fewer alerts.

item.title: Run AI SaaS solo in 2026
item.description: Build a solo AI SaaS 5x faster in 2026 — $328 vs $495 monthly cost breakdown, 14k vs 1.2k lines of code, and the SOC 2 compliance trick most miss.

item.title: AI agent postmortems: the three surprises
item.description: Catch AI agent failures 60 % faster with shadowing vs logging — real QPS, cost, and alert-latency numbers from Brazilian, Colombian, and Mexican production systems in 2026.

item.title: AI agents forget overnight — how to keep memory alive
item.description: The agent’s response time stayed under 200ms, so we blamed the retrieval layer.

item.title: Istio and Cilium: what really breaks in production
item.description: Cut mesh-induced latency 60% with Istio 1.21 and Cilium 1.16 — the control-plane backlog, certificate storms, and telemetry sampling mistakes most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: API abuse patterns rising in 2026
item.description: Cut API abuse 92% with edge filters — CloudFront Functions, Akamai Bot Manager, and Redis 7.2 beat JavaScript challenges and WAFs on latency and cost in 2026.

item.title: AI infra: capacity planning vs runbooks — what I’d
item.description: Cut cloud waste 73% and downtime 63% with AI capacity and runbooks in 2026. Compare Kubernetes VPA vs PagerDuty AI playbooks with concrete benchmarks and cost data.

item.title: SBOMs in 2026: automate releases with Syft 1.12
item.description: Cut 65% SBOM storage costs with Syft 1.12 and OCI registries — automate CycloneDX SBOMs in CI, fail builds on CVEs, and pass audits in 2026

item.title: Rerankers beat raw RAG every time
item.description: Cut search errors 76% with hybrid retrieval + reranking — BM25 + embeddings + cross-encoder on CPU in 2026

item.title: AI steals junior tasks: 3 skills that protect pay
item.description: Protect your 2026 salary: cut AI-driven boilerplate, validate features first, and measure revenue per hour. 3 skills that shield pay when AI automates junior work.

item.title: AI pair cuts code review time 75%
item.description: Cut code review time 78% with AI pair tools — GitHub Copilot Workspace vs CodeRabbit vs Amazon Q in a 6-month team experiment with concrete metrics and the one tool that paid for itself in 14 days.

item.title: AI rewrote my docs: the docs I deleted
item.description: Cut review time 60% with AI docs — but only after fixing contracts, tests, and specs. The constraints most teams skip that prevent AI from making things worse.

item.title: AI codebase onboarding: 2 paths tested
item.description: Cut onboarding time 60% with guided generation in AI codebases — tooling cost, CI queue drops, and the exact prompts that worked

item.title: 3 vibe coding tools I regret shipping in production
item.description: Cut API response time 80% by avoiding vibe coding debt — PocketBase, Supabase, Leaflet failures and FastAPI’s escape hatch at 2026 prices.

item.title: Cost vs accuracy: fine-tune small or prompt large?
item.description: Cut AI inference cost 73% without sacrificing accuracy — the dirty traffic, latency, and tokeniser gotchas most teams miss when choosing between fine-tuning small models or prompting large ones in 2026.

item.title: LLM latency: the cache patterns that still fool me
item.description: Cut LLM response time 67% with semantic caching, prompt compression, and edge layers — the real numbers from 8 k RPM in 2026
